/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_hdv_writeback.dir/hdv_writeback_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hdv_writeback.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hdv_writeback.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hdv_writeback.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hdv_writeback.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hdv_writeback.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hdv_writeback.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hdv_writeback.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hdv_writeback.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hdv_writeback.dir/__/ProDOSHardDiskCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hdv_writeback.dir/__/ProDOSVolume.cpp.o -o test_hdv_writeback  -ldl -lm
